title: Expose deploy git SHA on platform /health
problem: platform.noetfield.com /health and /api/public/chat/health do not expose deploy git SHA. Disk-vs-live RCA can only match knowledge manifest stats, not prove running code matches repo HEAD.
proposal: Add git_sha (and optional build_id) to GET /health and /api/public/chat/health from RAILWAY_GIT_COMMIT_SHA or equivalent at deploy time.
reason_gated: Touches platform deploy surface and health contract consumed by monitors.
